footer.description: {{brand}} Vietnam – Leading Korean modern supermarket chain in Vietnam. Delivering a premium shopping experience with thousands of quality products.
footer.copyright: © 2024 LOTTE Mart Vietnam. All rights reserved.

about.heroSubtitle: Delivering quality products, great value, and a modern shopping experience to millions of families across Vietnam.
about.storyTitle: Korea's Leading Supermarket Chain in Vietnam
about.storyDesc1: Since entering Vietnam, Lotte Mart has grown into one of the most trusted retail brands in the country. We operate a nationwide network of modern supermarkets, offering everything from fresh groceries and household essentials to electronics and fashion — all under one roof.
about.storyDesc2: Our commitment goes beyond products. We build lasting relationships with customers by consistently delivering quality, convenience, and value. Whether you shop in-store or online, Lotte Mart is here to make your daily life easier.
about.missionSubtitle: We exist to make everyday shopping simpler, smarter, and more rewarding for every customer.
about.missionQualityDesc: Every product on our shelves passes strict quality checks. We partner with trusted suppliers to ensure freshness, safety, and fair pricing across all categories.
about.missionConvenienceDesc: From in-store shopping to home delivery and online ordering, we design our services around your schedule. Shop whenever, wherever suits you best.
about.missionSmartDesc: Powered by technology, our platform offers personalized recommendations, price tracking, and AI-assisted features to help you shop smarter every time.
about.metricsSubtitle: Numbers that reflect our commitment to serving you better every day.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do at Lotte Mart.
about.valueQualityDesc: Rigorous standards for every product — from fresh produce to packaged goods.
about.valueConvenienceDesc: Shopping made easy with multiple channels, fast delivery, and seamless checkout.
about.valueTrustDesc: Transparent pricing, honest promotions, and reliable customer service you can count on.
about.valueServiceDesc: Friendly, responsive support at every touchpoint — in-store and online.
about.valueFreshnessDesc: Daily restocking and cold-chain logistics to keep your food fresh and safe.
about.valueInnovationDesc: Embracing technology to create a smarter, more personalized shopping journey.
about.whySubtitle: Here's what makes us the preferred choice for millions of shoppers.
about.whyCuratedDesc: Thousands of carefully selected products across groceries, household, beauty, electronics, and more.
about.whyBranchDesc: Visit any of our modern supermarkets across major cities in Vietnam for a premium in-store experience.
about.whySmartDesc: Our Smart Shopping features suggest products based on your preferences, history, and seasonal trends.
about.whyReliableDesc: Consistent quality at competitive prices, backed by regular promotions and member-exclusive deals.
about.whySupportDesc: Our support team is available via chat, phone, and in-store to assist with any questions or concerns.
about.whyModernDesc: A seamless omni-channel experience — browse online, order via app, or enjoy shopping at our stores.
about.ctaTitle: Start Shopping with Lotte Mart Today
about.ctaDesc: Join millions of satisfied customers who trust Lotte Mart for their daily shopping needs. Explore our products, grab exclusive deals, and experience the difference.
